chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1933 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.8750/2022 (Exemption) 2. For order on CMA No.8751/2022 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 13.8.2025 None present for the petitioners -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2022. On its very inception over three years ago, none was present for the petitioners without intimation. In the last three years, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to pursue this petition diligently. No one has ever appeared for the petitioners in this case. Despite the lapse of three years, today, once again, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
